title: Room Templates Content File
description: The authored room template set the interior editor (spec §19) places on the hull grid — sizes in cells, required systems, furniture slots, and adjacency-bonus pairings. One file carries the whole set.

id.description: Unique identifier for this template set

display_name.description: Human-readable name for display in the editor UI

seed.description: Canonical seed (hash of content_override, system_id, object_id)

universe.description: 'all' or a universe tier name (classic, fair_play, spectrum, byok)

expires_at.description: Optional expiration timestamp (only meaningful when priority is 'event')

id.description: Template id, unique within the set (PlacedRoom.template_id references it)

kind.description: The realized RoomKind, unique within the set (crew duty rooms map by kind)

label.description: Display name in the editor palette

width.description: Unrotated width in placement cells (1 cell = 8 grid units)

required_systems.description: Ship systems this room needs to function (inert pipes until their systems exist)

furniture_slots.description: Slot ids furniture can fill, unique within the template (PlacedFurniture.slot_id references them)

adjacent_pairs.description: Room kinds this template gains an adjacency bonus next to

room_templates.description: The template set the editor palette cycles through
